item.title: First post
item.description: This line is from content/firstpost.md. Home

item.title: Proposal
item.description: Proposal for Lambda A Tabletop Roleplaying Game Campaign | By Alex Hartford Priorities The game I propose is a game in which… Decisions are more important than choices. The utmost care is taken to strip away everything which does not lead to some interesting consequence or implication. Heroes’ true character is revealed. I tend to focus on choices which impact who a character is, and what they believe in. I draw heavy inspiration from film.
